strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and Vitest
Strong background in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators)
Proven track record in optimizing performance, scalability, and user experience across diverse projects
concerns: Limited recent experience with Nest.js, a primary stack requirement
No explicit mention of PostgreSQL or MySQL in resume despite requirement for relational databases
Secondary stack experience with Kotlin/Java is not prominently featured in recent roles
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates deep full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, along with recent AI-agent infrastructure experience highly relevant to the role. However, his limited recent exposure to Nest.js and some primary stack technologies, as well as gaps in database specifics, may require validation during screening.
